title: GRAPE SEED EXTRACT
description: Grape seed extract (GSE) is a dietary supplement derived from grape seeds containing proanthocyanidins, powerful antioxidant compounds. It works by neutralizing free radicals, reducing inflammation, and improving blood vessel function through enhanced nitric oxide production. Primary applications include cardiovascular support, blood pressure management, and antioxidant protection.

research.title: The effect of grape seed extract supplementation on oxidative stress and inflammation: A systematic review and meta-analysis of controlled trials
research.summary: Systematic review and meta-analysis demonstrating that GSE supplementation significantly reduces oxidative stress markers and inflammatory markers in controlled trials, supporting its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.

research.title: Grape Seed Extract Positively Modulates Blood Pressure and Perceived Stress: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Study in Healthy Volunteers
research.summary: Randomized controlled trial showing that 300mg/day GSE for 16 weeks significantly reduced blood pressure and improved perceived stress levels in healthy volunteers compared to placebo.

research.title: Effects of Grape Seed Extract Supplementation on Endothelial Function and Endurance Performance in Basketball Players
research.summary: Study in elite athletes demonstrating that chronic GSE supplementation improves endothelial function and blood flow, with potential benefits for exercise performance through enhanced vascular health.

sentiment.summary: User sentiment is genuinely mixed with limited available feedback. While research demonstrates cardiovascular and antioxidant benefits, there is insufficient Reddit user data to establish clear patterns of subjective effectiveness or user satisfaction with the supplement.

effects.label: Cardiovascular Benefits:
effects.description: Strong evidence for improving endothelial function, blood flow, and reducing blood pressure in clinical trials

effects.label: Antioxidant Activity:
effects.description: Well-documented reduction in oxidative stress markers across multiple studies with consistent positive results

effects.label: Stress Modulation:
effects.description: Emerging evidence for reducing perceived stress levels alongside blood pressure improvements

effects.label: Individual Variation:
effects.description: Effects may be more pronounced in individuals with pre-existing cardiovascular risk factors or oxidative stress

dosage.label: Standard Dose:
dosage.description: 300mg per day is the most commonly studied and effective dosage in clinical trials

dosage.label: Duration:
dosage.description: Benefits typically observed after 8-16 weeks of consistent supplementation

dosage.label: Timing:
dosage.description: Can be taken once daily, timing appears less critical than consistency

dosage.label: Standardization:
dosage.description: Look for extracts standardized to 95% proanthocyanidins for reliable potency

sideEffects.label: General Tolerability:
sideEffects.description: Well-tolerated in clinical studies with minimal reported adverse effects

sideEffects.label: Digestive Issues:
sideEffects.description: Occasional mild gastrointestinal discomfort reported at higher doses

sideEffects.label: Drug Interactions:
sideEffects.description: May interact with blood thinners due to antiplatelet effects

sideEffects.label: Safety Profile:
sideEffects.description: Generally recognized as safe with no serious adverse events in controlled trials

availability.label: Supplement Market:
availability.description: Widely available as standardized extracts through various supplement retailers and online stores

availability.label: Quality Variation:
availability.description: Important to choose products standardized for proanthocyanidin content to ensure effectiveness

availability.label: Legal Status:
availability.description: Legal and unregulated as a dietary supplement in most countries with no prescription required
